prompts.WO-BORROWED-NOSTALGIA: Square product photograph, harsh overhead fluorescent light, heavy film grain. A battered VHS tape and a single faded photo negative strip laid on crumpled cream newsprint. A rusted safety pin pierces the corner of an old photo print face-down beside them. High-contrast monochrome tones, deep black shadows, occasional xerox streak. Tight square crop, no text, no logos.
prompts.WO-BOTTLED-MORNING: Square product photograph, single harsh top-down fluorescent light. A small amber glass bottle sealed with wax, condensation on exterior, sitting on a torn piece of cream newsprint beside a bent spoon. Heavy photocopy grain, near-monochrome, blown highlights on glass shoulder. Deep inkwell shadows. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-CHAOS-SEASONING: Square product photograph, harsh raking side light. A dented tin shaker with punched holes, lying on its side on crumpled newsprint, contents spilling — coarse mixed granules catching the light. A crumpled foil wrapper nearby. Extreme photocopy grain, high contrast monochrome, crushed blacks. Tight square crop, no text, no logos.
prompts.WO-COSMIC-MYSTERY-BOX: Square product photograph, fluorescent overhead light with hard shadow. A small brown cardboard box sealed with black electrical tape, corner dented, sitting on newsprint. A question mark scrawled in black marker on the lid visible only as texture not legible text. Heavy grain, near-monochrome, xerox streak across the surface. No logos, no readable text.
prompts.WO-DEJA-VU-SESSION: Square product photograph, hard single-source light from upper left. Two identical small glass vials side by side on crumpled cream newsprint, each containing a thin dark liquid. A loop of clear tape holds them together. High-contrast monochrome, deep shadows, heavy photocopy grain, slight motion blur on one vial. Tight square crop, no text, no logos.
prompts.WO-DISCOUNT-GRAVITY: Square product photograph, overhead fluorescent, deep shadow. A small clear plastic bag half-filled with smooth grey pebbles, sealed with a twist tie, lying flat on torn newsprint. One pebble escaped outside the bag. Near-monochrome, crushed blacks, heavy xerographic grain, paper texture prominent. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-DREAD-REPELLENT: Square product photograph, harsh side light, heavy shadow. A pocket-sized aerosol can with a dented body and no label, cap off, placed on crumpled cream newsprint beside a bent safety pin. Near-monochrome, extreme photocopy grain, bright specular highlight on can shoulder, deep black shadows. Square crop, no text, no logos.
prompts.WO-FOG-IN-BOTTLE: Square product photograph, diffused cold fluorescent light. A squat clear glass jar with a metal lid, interior filled with dense white cotton representing fog, sitting on creased newsprint. Heavy photocopy grain, near-monochrome, blown whites inside jar contrasting with deep shadow below. Tight square crop, no text, no logos.
prompts.WO-FORBIDDEN-HONEY: Square product photograph, hard top-down light. A small dark hexagonal glass jar, lid sealed with black wax drips, standing on torn newsprint. A rusty spoon rests diagonally in frame. Amber tones desaturated near-monochrome, heavy grain, deep inkwell shadows, bright specular on wax seal. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-GENTLY-USED-LUCK: Square product photograph, raking fluorescent light. A worn rabbit's foot keychain with a bent metal clasp, lying on crumpled cream newsprint beside a cracked four-leaf clover laminate card. Near-monochrome, heavy photocopy grain, crushed blacks, small rust-orange accent from metal clasp. Tight square crop, no text, no logos.
prompts.WO-HANDCRAFTED-ECHO: Square product photograph, single overhead hard light. A small cupped hand-formed clay bowl, rough unglazed surface, with a coiled wire inside it, sitting on torn newsprint. Deep shadows inside bowl, near-monochrome, extreme xerographic grain, paper texture bleeds into frame edges. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-HAUNTED-CANDLE: Square product photograph, dramatic side light from lower left. A half-burned pillar candle with heavy drip trails, wick curled, sitting in a pool of dried wax on newsprint. Smoke wisp rising from just-extinguished wick. Near-monochrome, heavy grain, high-contrast shadows, hint of warm wax tone desaturated. Square crop, no text, no logos.
prompts.WO-IMAGINARY-DEED: Square product photograph, harsh fluorescent overhead. A folded piece of aged cream paper, edges frayed, sealed with a small blob of dark wax, lying flat on crumpled newsprint. A bent paperclip rests on top. Near-monochrome, deep crushed blacks, heavy xerox grain, paper texture dominant. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-INTERDIM-BAZAAR: Square product photograph, hard raking light from right. A small crate made of matchsticks and rubber bands, filled with miscellaneous tiny objects — a button, a coin, a shard of mirror — on crumpled newsprint. Near-monochrome, photocopy grain, specular flash off mirror shard, deep shadows inside crate. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-INVISIBLE-UMBRELLA: Square product photograph, flat cold fluorescent light. An empty closed umbrella sleeve — just the fabric tube — collapsed and taped shut with black electrical tape, lying on newsprint. Shadow shaped like an open umbrella projected by off-camera object onto newsprint. Near-monochrome, heavy grain. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-LEFT-SOCK: Square product photograph, harsh overhead fluorescent. A single thick grey wool sock, slightly worn heel, folded once on crumpled cream newsprint. A lone safety pin pierces the cuff. Near-monochrome, photocopy grain, deep shadow pooling beside the sock, crushed blacks. Tight square crop, no text, no logos.
prompts.WO-LOST-RECIPE-TIME: Square product photograph, raking side light. A small weathered index card with illegible handwritten lines, pinned with a rusted safety pin to a scrap of torn newsprint. A broken pencil lies across the corner. Near-monochrome, heavy xerographic grain, faint smear marks, deep shadows. No logos, no readable text.
prompts.WO-MEMORY-FOAM-MEMORY: Square product photograph, soft diffused cold light with hard edge shadow. A small cube of off-white memory foam, compressed on one side with a deep thumbprint indent, sitting on crumpled newsprint. Near-monochrome, heavy photocopy grain, blown highlights on foam surface, crushed black shadow beneath. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-MONDAY-KIT: Square product photograph, harsh top-down fluorescent. A beat-up ziplock bag containing: a crumpled receipt, two aspirin, a dead AA battery, and a dull pencil stub. Laid flat on newsprint. Near-monochrome, extreme photocopy grain, deep shadows at bag edges, slightly overexposed center. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-MOON-DUST: Square product photograph, single overhead hard light. A small open kraft paper envelope with fine grey-white powder spilling from the lip onto crumpled newsprint, a smeared dusting around it. Near-monochrome, heavy xerographic grain, blown highlights on powder pile, deep inkwell shadows. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-ONE-HAND-CLAPPING: Square product photograph, raking fluorescent side light. A single worn leather work glove, fingers curled halfway, lying on newsprint. Its pair is absent — deliberate empty space to the right. Near-monochrome, heavy grain, photocopy streak across upper frame, deep cast shadow. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-POCKET-THUNDER: Square product photograph, hard single-source light from above-left. A small dark metal tin the size of an Altoids box, dented lid, closed, resting on crumpled newsprint. A jagged hand-torn strip of black electrical tape seals the seam. Near-monochrome, heavy xerox grain, specular on tin edge, crushed blacks. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-PORTABLE-HOLE: Square product photograph, harsh overhead fluorescent. A folded square of matte black fabric — extremely dark, absorbing all light — lying flat on cream newsprint creating an illusion of a void in the paper. Safety pin in corner. High contrast, near-monochrome, heavy grain, edges blown. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-SENSORY-STARTER: Square product photograph, side-raking cold light. A small cardboard box open-topped, containing a swatch of corduroy, a smooth river pebble, a piece of aluminum foil, and a strip of sandpaper. On newsprint. Near-monochrome, photocopy grain, detailed texture contrast between contents, deep shadow inside box. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-SILENCE-JAR: Square product photograph, flat cold overhead light. A small wide-mouth mason jar with lid tightly sealed, completely empty, sitting on crumpled cream newsprint. Reflection of fluorescent tube visible on glass. Near-monochrome, heavy photocopy grain, blown highlights on jar rim, deep shadow below. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-SPARE-KEY-NOWHERE: Square product photograph, hard raking light from upper right. A single old brass key on a split ring, lying on crumpled newsprint beside a small torn paper tag. The tag is blank. Near-monochrome with faint warm brass tone desaturated, heavy xerographic grain, deep black shadow, paper texture prominent. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-SPARE-TUESDAY: Square product photograph, harsh fluorescent overhead. A standard weekly pill organizer, Tuesday compartment open and empty, all others closed, lying on crumpled newsprint. Near-monochrome, heavy photocopy grain, specular highlights on plastic compartments, deep shadow in open slot. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-TANGIBLE-WIFI: Square product photograph, hard top-down fluorescent light. A tangle of old ethernet cable coiled loosely on crumpled newsprint, one end connector missing. A bent paperclip is threaded through a cable loop. Near-monochrome, extreme photocopy grain, cable casts hard shadow, crushed blacks. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-VOID-SAMPLER: Square product photograph, dramatic single overhead spot. A matte black sample card — like a paint chip — lying on crumpled cream newsprint, entirely uniform black on its face, edges torn. Deep shadow merges with the card. Near-monochrome, heavy grain, extreme contrast, minimal detail in shadows. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-WHISPERING-STONE: Square product photograph, soft raking fluorescent light from one side. A single smooth grey river stone, palm-sized, sitting on crumpled cream newsprint. Faint surface scratches catch the raking light. Near-monochrome, heavy photocopy grain, long hard shadow to one side, subtle texture detail on stone surface. No text, no logos.
